displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Chewbacca And The Wookiee Warriors
synopsis: A leveled reader for children learning to read on their own. Chewbacca the Wookiee teams up with the Jedi Ahsoka Tano and a group of marooned Jedi younglings to fight their way out of a planetwide Trandoshan hunting party.
title: The Clone Wars: Chewbacca And The Wookiee Warriors
